title: Formal Skill: Programmable Runtime Skills for Efficient and Accurate LLM Agents
summary: Formal Skill: Programmable Runtime Skills for Efficient and Accurate LLM Agents
whyItMatters: Large Language Model (LLM) agents increasingly act inside real workspaces, where tools and skills determine whether model reasoning becomes reliable action. Existing skills remain largely informal: Markdown skills and instruction packs encode procedures as long natural-language documents, while function calling, Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, and fra…
